---
title: "Growth_Data_Exploration"
output: html_document
date: "2026-03-05"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

library(tidyverse)

library(gtools) #testing

```

## Data

Each data pathway is different, so upload the data from your computer 

```{r}
#View(ToxGrowth)
```

```{r}
unique(ToxGrowth$Species)
```

```{r}
ToxGrowth %>%
  filter(Species == "Lampsilis siliquoidea") %>%
  replace(is.na(.), 0) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Tox_conc, y = Dry_rep_wt), ) +
  geom_point(alpha=.6) 

# above species tested twice (two different years)

ToxGrowth %>%
  filter(Species == "Villosa iris") %>%
  replace(is.na(.), 0) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Tox_conc, y = Dry_rep_wt), ) +
  geom_point(alpha=.6) 

ToxGrowth %>%
  filter(Species == "Hyalella azteca") %>%
  replace(is.na(.), 0) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Tox_conc, y = Dry_rep_wt), ) +
  geom_point(alpha=.6) 

ToxGrowth %>%
  filter(Species == "Pimephales promelas") %>%
  replace(is.na(.), 0) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Tox_conc, y = Dry_rep_wt), ) +
  geom_point(alpha=.6) 

ToxGrowth %>%
  filter(Species == "Oncorhynchus mykiss") %>%
  replace(is.na(.), 0) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Tox_conc, y = Dry_rep_wt), ) +
  geom_point(alpha=.6) 

# above species tested twice (two different years)

ToxGrowth %>%
  filter(Species == "Chironomus dilutus") %>%
  replace(is.na(.), 0) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Tox_conc, y = Dry_rep_wt), ) +
  geom_point(alpha=.6) 


```

```{r}
ToxGrowth$Tox_conc=as.character(ToxGrowth$Tox_conc)
ToxGrowth$Tox_conc=as.numeric(ToxGrowth$Tox_conc)
class(ToxGrowth$Tox_conc)
ToxGrowth$Tox_conc1=str_sort(ToxGrowth$Tox_conc, numeric = TRUE) #pissing me off
print(ToxGrowth$Tox_conc)
print(ToxGrowth$Tox_conc1)

Rainbowmussel=ToxGrowth %>%
  filter(Species == "Villosa iris") #%>%
  #factor(ToxGrowth$Tox_conc , levels=c(20, 228, 392, 713, 1462, 3000,))

ToxGrowth$Tox_conc1 = factor(ToxGrowth$Tox_conc , levels=c(20, 228, 392, 713, 1462, 3000,)) #also pissing me off

Rainbowmussel$Tox_conc2=mixedsort(Rainbowmussel$Tox_conc) #not doing what i want
Rainbowmussel %>%
  replace(is.na(.), 0) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Tox_conc2, y = Dry_rep_wt), ) +
  geom_boxplot() 
```

```{r}
ToxGrowth %>%
  filter(Species == "Lampsilis siliquoidea") %>%
 #  %>%
  replace(is.na(.), 0) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Tox_conc, y = Dry_rep_wt), ) +
  geom_boxplot() 
 # facet_wrap(~Year)

# above species tested twice (two different years)

Rainbowmussel %>%
  replace(is.na(.), 0) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Tox_conc, y = Dry_rep_wt), ) +
  geom_boxplot() 

ToxGrowth %>%
  filter(Species == "Hyalella azteca") %>%
  replace(is.na(.), 0) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Tox_conc, y = Dry_rep_wt), ) +
  geom_point(alpha=.6) 

ToxGrowth %>%
  filter(Species == "Pimephales promelas") %>%
  replace(is.na(.), 0) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Tox_conc, y = Dry_rep_wt), ) +
  geom_point(alpha=.6) 

ToxGrowth %>%
  filter(Species == "Oncorhynchus mykiss") %>%
  replace(is.na(.), 0) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Tox_conc, y = Dry_rep_wt), ) +
  geom_point(alpha=.6) 

# above species tested twice (two different years)

ToxGrowth %>%
  filter(Species == "Chironomus dilutus") %>%
  replace(is.na(.), 0) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Tox_conc, y = Dry_rep_wt), ) +
  geom_point(alpha=.6) 


```
